description: You are a university library archivist digitizing a 16mm oral history film. Restore the raw capture at /home/ga/Videos/telecine_capture_glitched.mkv by correcting three defects: delay the audio by 1500ms to fix desync, deinterlace the footage to remove combing artifacts, and set the display aspect ratio to 16:9. Transcode the output to H.264 video and AAC audio in an MP4 container at /home/ga/Videos/restored_archive.mp4. Additionally, generate a JSON report at /home/ga/Documents/restoration_log.json containing the keys 'source_file', 'issues_fixed' (array), 'audio_delay_ms' (number), 'aspect_ratio_target', and 'deinterlace_applied' (boolean).
